description_long: This is a white ceramic cup featuring a vibrant, watercolor-style illustration of several iconic superheroes in dynamic poses. The artwork wraps around the exterior, with characters rendered in bold, splattered colors including green, red, blue, and yellow. The cup has a smooth cylindrical body and a rounded handle, which is plain white and attached to one side. The interior of the cup is also white and appears to be glazed, giving it a clean and polished look. The surface finish is glossy, enhancing the vividness of the printed artwork. There are no visible logos or text, but the decorative superhero motif is prominent and eye-catching.
description: A white ceramic cup with a glossy finish, decorated with a colorful, wraparound superhero illustration and a plain white handle.
description_view_0: This view shows the left side of the cup, highlighting a green superhero and parts of two others in dynamic poses.
description_view_1: This view centers on the handle, with only partial artwork visible on either side and the handle itself in plain white.
description_view_2: This view displays the right side of the cup, featuring several superheroes in red, yellow, and blue costumes in action stances.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the back of the cup, showing a superhero with a shield and another in a crouched pose, with the artwork continuing seamlessly.
